channel.title: Dual NTP software run at the same time
channel.description:
Hi all!
I am running Kicksecure on my servers. But all of my servers needs NTP to be the same.
Does Kicksecure allow me to config like this?
\[Internet NTP\] ←(Tor+swdate fetch time data from the internet) \[NTP server\] (Chrony/NTPD Provide NTP to other machine on local internet)
Thanks in advance!

item.title: Dual NTP software run at the same time
item.dc:creator: SteveK1978
item.description:
Hi all!

I am running Kicksecure on my servers. But all of my servers needs NTP to be the same.

Does Kicksecure allow me to config like this?

[Internet NTP] ←(Tor+swdate fetch time data from the internet) [NTP server] (Chrony/NTPD Provide NTP to other machine on local internet)

Thanks in advance!

Read full topic
item.source: Dual NTP software run at the same time
